output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?country WHERE {
  ?powerPlant wdt:P31 wd:Q541658 ; wdt:P17 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
HAVING(COUNT(?powerPlant) > 3)
